text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, this is Michael speaking. How can I assist you today?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Hi, Michael. It's Susan Evans. I need to schedule an oil change for my car.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Hi, Susan! Great to hear from you. When would you like to come in?
segments.speaker: local party

text: I was hoping to do it this week, maybe Thursday?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Let me check our schedule for Thursday. One moment, please.
segments.speaker: local party

text: It looks like we have openings at 10:00 AM or 2:00 PM. Which time works for you?
segments.speaker: local party

text: The 10:00 AM slot works perfectly.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Great! I’ll book you for 10:00 AM on Thursday for an oil change.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Thank you! Just a quick question—how much is the oil change again?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: The oil change is between $40 and $60, depending on the oil type we use.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Got it. I’ll trust your judgment on that.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Absolutely! We'll use the best option for your vehicle.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Also, I was wondering if you could check my brakes while I’m there? They’ve been making a bit of noise lately.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Sure, we can do a brake inspection for $30 while your car is here.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Sounds good to me!
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Awesome! So, that’s an oil change and a brake inspection scheduled for Thursday at 10:00 AM.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Yes, perfect. Also, could you send me a reminder via email?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Of course! I’ll make sure to send you an email reminder before your appointment.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Thank you! Oh, is there anything else I should be aware of?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Just a heads-up, we offer a full vehicle diagnostic service if you’re experiencing any other issues.
segments.speaker: local party

text: I might consider that if the brake noise continues.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: That sounds like a plan. We'll go through everything during your visit.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Great! Thanks for your help, Michael.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: No problem at all, Susan. We’re looking forward to seeing you on Thursday!
segments.speaker: local party

text: Thanks! Have a great day!
segments.speaker: remote party

text: You too! Bye now.
segments.speaker: local party
